title: Update CTA button hyperlinks to demo URL

requirements.text: Update the 'Request the demo' button in the CallToAction component to link to https://ai.studio/apps/29036910-44c0-41d1-86a5-c8a35a69379f

quotes: In "Request the demo" and "Get started ", when someone clicks on it make sure the hyperlink is this https://ai.studio/apps/29036910-44c0-41d1-86a5-c8a35a69379f

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Request the demo' button navigates to the specified URL when clicked
The link opens in a new tab with appropriate security attributes
